name: chaingpt
description: The Web3 toolkit for Claude Code. AI-powered (ChainGPT chat / NFT / Solidity generator + auditor / crypto news / Solidity LLM) PLUS generic Web3: multi-chain wallet portfolios, token research (DexScreener), risk scanning (GoPlus + Honeypot), on-chain analytics (Etherscan v2), and AI-enriched composed intel calls that funnel ChainGPT credits. 45+ audited Solidity patterns + zero-credit mock server.
